---
title: "I can't export file MP3 in Audacity."
date: 2008-05-17
forum: Ubuntu Studio
---

### Post by aurora_consurgens on 2008-05-17
How I can export MP3 File in Audacity. I try Edit > Preferences > File Formats. 

And MP3 Export Setup  at MP3 Library Version it say:  Mp3 Exporting plugin not found.

How I can get it?

Thank you

---

### Post by warbread on 2008-05-17
Have you tried [installing the mp3 codec]("https://help.ubuntu.com/community/RestrictedFormats#head-7dc8d31ff5c7ccda3d326c0c17763853d296dc07")?

---

### Post by Stochastic on 2008-05-17
The method Warbread is suggesting will work fine, but it will also install other codecs you may not need (though most people would like them in the long run).  If you just want mp3 support do ```
sudo apt-get install lame liblame0 lame-extras
```

---

### Post by BigAl-SA on 2008-12-20
> **Stochastic said:**
> The method Warbread is suggesting will work fine, but it will also install other codecs you may not need (though most people would like them in the long run).  If you just want mp3 support do ```
sudo apt-get install lame liblame0 lame-extras
```Just to update this, with 8.10, you need libmp3lame0 rather than liblame0 (which is no longer in the repository). lame-extras also no longer seems to be in the repositories.

---
